_description: OPTIONAL block appended ALONGSIDE rules (a sibling of rules, NOT inside it). It is not a pick type. Stage 1: every pick that shares a pool_id resolves normally via its own rules.type. Stage 2: the picks whose stage-1 owner satisfies enters_pool_if are gathered, ranked, and the one at pool_resolution.rank is conveyed to pool_resolution.to. Engine: resolve_pick (stage 1) then the pool comparison in engine_v2.py. The only dataset use today is det_2028_2_utah_pool (Detroit's worst 2028 2nd -> Utah; members: detroit pro_pick, charlotte+lac unpro_swap, miami unpro_backup, new_york unprotected).

rules.type: any base type (unprotected, pro_pick, unpro_swap, pro_swap, unpro_backup, ...) — the pick's own stage-1 resolution
